title: EventEnvelope
description: Phase 3 (docs/mvp-plan/PRD-Phase-3.md REQ-3.3) event envelope, per docs/architecture/Coding_Standards.md's Events section. Versioning policy: docs/adr/ADR-005-event-schema-versioning.md.

eventId.description: Unique per event, generated by the producer.

eventType.description: E.g. MISSION_PROCESSING_REQUESTED. Versioned per ADR-005 independently of other event types.

eventVersion.description: Per-eventType version per ADR-005 — bumped only on a breaking payload change.

occurredAt.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the producer created the event.

correlationId.description: Carried from the originating HTTP request (packages/observability's CORRELATION_ID_HEADER) through the outbox row and every downstream event/log line.

causationId.description: eventId of the event that triggered this one, or null for the first event in a chain (e.g. one produced directly from an HTTP request).

producer.description: Service name that produced the event, e.g. api, vision-service.

payload.description: eventType-specific payload — see the matching *.schema.json in this directory.
